有冇巴打可以詳細分析下做 BS consultant 同main con 既分別（包括工作性質，前景，人工待遇等）

Maincon 考脾較難 soft skills > technical
人工高 上PM 位搵好多
做工程唔好預工時短

Anyone consider joining the British Army?

You can join up if you are a BN(O) passport holder.

According to the latest Armed Forces Pay Review Body report, the Armed Forces 'are experiencing significant problems in both recruiting and retaining sufficient numbers of engineers for both officers and other ranks (ORs)'. (3.22)

https://www.gov.uk/government/uploads/system/uploads/attachment_data/file/603494/58422_Armed_Forces_Pay_Web_Accessible.pdf

Have a look at the thread below for details -

BNO與其去做慈母　不如加入英軍
